name: Eggplant Parmesian -Bsnx01a
recipeIngredient: 1 large eggplant, sliced into short side pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the dark skin off the eggplant and slice it into medium-thick slices (about 1/2 in).
2. Place flavored breadcrumbs in a plate or dish.
3. Beat 3 eggs for dipping.
4. Heat oil in a large pan and fry the eggplant until both sides are brown. Flip to ensure all sides are browned.
5. Drain fried patties on paper towels.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Coat a 9x1-1/2 inch disposable aluminum pan with oil.
8. Pour tomato sauce at the bottom of the pan and place layers of eggplant patties, cheese, and mozzarella.
9. Repeat layering until the pan is full.
10. Cover with foil and bake for 45 minutes.
11. Check if it's hot all the way through; if not, cook an additional 10 minutes.
12. Remove foil and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
This dish tastes even better reheated in a microwaveable dish. Enjoy!
